text: The burden<S>4853</S> of the word<S>1697</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> to Israel<S>3478</S> by<S>3027</S> Malachi<S>4401</S>.

I have loved<S>157</S> you<S>5002</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>. Yet ye say<S>559</S>, Wherein hast thou loved<S>157</S> us<S>6215</S>? Was not Esau Jacob<S>3290</S>'s brother<S>251</S>? saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>: yet I loved<S>157</S> Jacob<S>3290</S>;
but Esau<S>6215</S> I hated<S>8130</S>, and made<S>7760</S> his mountains<S>2022</S> a desolation<S>8077</S>, and gave his heritage<S>5159</S> to the jackals<S>8568</S> of the wilderness<S>4057</S>.

Whereas Edom<S>123</S> saith<S>559</S>, We are beaten<S>7567</S> down<S>7725</S>, but we will return and build<S>1129</S> the waste places<S>2723</S>; thus saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, They shall build<S>1129</S>, but I will throw down<S>2040</S>; and men shall call<S>7121</S> them The border<S>1366</S> of wickedness<S>7564</S>, and The people<S>5971</S> against whom Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath indignation<S>2194</S> for<S>5704</S> ever<S>5769</S>.
And your eyes<S>5869</S> shall see<S>7200</S>, and ye shall say<S>559</S>, Jehovah<S>3068</S> be magnified<S>1431</S> beyond the border<S>1366</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>.

A son<S>1121</S> honoreth<S>3513</S> his father<S>1</S>, and a servant<S>5650</S> his master<S>113</S>: if then I am a father<S>1</S>, where is mine honor<S>3519</S>? and if I am a master<S>113</S>, where is my fear<S>4172</S>? saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S> unto you<S>3548</S>, O priests, that despise<S>959</S> my name<S>8034</S>. And ye say<S>559</S>, Wherein have we despised<S>959</S> thy name<S>8034</S>?

Ye offer<S>5066</S> polluted<S>1351</S> bread<S>3899</S> upon mine altar<S>4196</S>. And ye say<S>559</S>, Wherein have we polluted<S>1351</S> thee<S>559</S>? In that ye say, The table<S>7979</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> is contemptible<S>959</S>.

And when ye offer<S>5066</S> the blind<S>5787</S> for sacrifice<S>2076</S>, it is no evil<S>7451</S>! and when ye offer<S>5066</S> the lame<S>6455</S> and sick<S>2470</S>, it is no evil<S>7451</S>! Present<S>7126</S> it now unto thy governor<S>6346</S>; will he be pleased<S>7521</S> with thee<S>5375</S>? or will he accept thy person<S>6440</S>? saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

And now<S>2470</S>, I pray you, entreat the favor of God<S>410</S>, that he may be gracious<S>2603</S> unto us<S>3027</S>: this hath been by your means: will he accept<S>5375</S> any of your persons<S>6440</S>? saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

Oh that there were one among you that would shut<S>5462</S> the doors<S>1817</S>, that ye might not kindle<S>215</S> fire on mine altar<S>4196</S> in vain<S>2600</S>! I have no pleasure<S>2656</S> in you<S>559</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, neither will I accept<S>7521</S> an offering<S>4503</S> at your hand<S>3027</S>.

For from the rising<S>4217</S> of the sun<S>8121</S> even unto the going down<S>3996</S> of the same my name<S>8034</S> shall be great<S>1419</S> among the Gentiles<S>1471</S>; and in every place<S>4725</S> incense<S>6999</S> shall be offered<S>5066</S> unto my name<S>8034</S>, and a pure<S>2889</S> offering<S>4503</S>: for my name<S>8034</S> shall be great<S>1419</S> among the Gentiles<S>1471</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

But ye profane<S>2490</S> it<S>559</S>, in that ye say, The table<S>7979</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> is polluted<S>1351</S>, and the fruit<S>5108</S> thereof<S>400</S>, even its food, is contemptible<S>959</S>.

Ye say<S>559</S> also<S>4972</S>, Behold, what a weariness is it<S>5301</S>! and ye have snuffed at it<S>559</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>; and ye have brought<S>935</S> that which was taken by violence<S>1497</S>, and the lame<S>6455</S>, and the sick<S>2470</S>; thus ye bring<S>935</S> the offering<S>4503</S>: should I accept<S>7521</S> this at your hand<S>3027</S>? saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>.

But cursed<S>779</S> be the deceiver<S>5230</S>, who<S>3426</S> hath in his flock<S>5739</S> a male<S>2145</S>, and voweth<S>5087</S>, and sacrificeth<S>2076</S> unto the Lord<S>136</S> a blemished thing<S>7843</S>; for I am a great<S>1419</S> King<S>4428</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, and my name<S>8034</S> is terrible<S>3372</S> among the Gentiles<S>1471</S>.
And now<S>3548</S>, O ye priests, this commandment is for you<S>4687</S>.

If ye will not hear<S>8085</S>, and if ye will not lay<S>7760</S> it to heart<S>3820</S>, to give<S>5414</S> glory<S>3519</S> unto my name<S>8034</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, then will I send<S>7971</S> the curse<S>3994</S> upon you<S>779</S>, and I will curse your blessings<S>1293</S>; yea<S>779</S>, I have cursed them already<S>7760</S>, because ye do not lay it to heart<S>3820</S>.

Behold<S>1605</S>, I will rebuke your seed<S>2233</S>, and will spread<S>2219</S> dung<S>6569</S> upon your faces<S>6440</S>, even the dung<S>6569</S> of your feasts<S>2282</S>; and ye shall be taken away with it<S>5375</S>.

And ye shall know<S>3045</S> that I have sent<S>7971</S> this commandment<S>4687</S> unto you<S>1285</S>, that my covenant may be with Levi<S>3878</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

My covenant<S>1285</S> was with him of life<S>2416</S> and peace<S>7965</S>; and I gave<S>5414</S> them to him that he might fear<S>4172</S>; and he feared<S>3372</S> me<S>6440</S>, and stood in awe<S>2865</S> of my name<S>8034</S>.

The law<S>8451</S> of truth<S>571</S> was in his mouth<S>6310</S>, and unrighteousness<S>5766</S> was not found<S>4672</S> in his lips<S>8193</S>: he walked<S>1980</S> with me in peace<S>7965</S> and uprightness<S>4334</S>, and turned<S>7725</S> many<S>7227</S> away<S>7725</S> from iniquity<S>5771</S>.

For the priest<S>3548</S>'s lips<S>8193</S> should keep<S>8104</S> knowledge<S>1847</S>, and they should seek<S>1245</S> the law<S>8451</S> at his mouth<S>6310</S>; for he is the messenger<S>4397</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

But ye are turned<S>5493</S> aside out of the way<S>1870</S>; ye have caused many<S>7227</S> to stumble<S>3782</S> in the law<S>8451</S>; ye have corrupted<S>7843</S> the covenant<S>1285</S> of Levi<S>3878</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

Therefore have I also made<S>5414</S> you contemptible<S>959</S> and base<S>8217</S> before all the people<S>5971</S>, according<S>6310</S> as ye have not kept<S>8104</S> my ways<S>1870</S>, but have had respect<S>5375</S> of persons in the law<S>8451</S>.

Have we not all one<S>259</S> father<S>1</S>? hath not one<S>259</S> God<S>410</S> created<S>1254</S> us<S>898</S>? why do we deal treacherously every man<S>376</S> against his brother<S>251</S>, profaning<S>2490</S> the covenant<S>1285</S> of our fathers<S>1</S>?

Judah<S>3063</S> hath dealt treacherously<S>898</S>, and an abomination<S>8441</S> is committed<S>6213</S> in Israel<S>3478</S> and in Jerusalem<S>3389</S>; for Judah<S>3063</S> hath profaned<S>2490</S> the holiness<S>6944</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> which he loveth<S>157</S>, and hath married<S>1166</S> the daughter<S>1323</S> of a foreign<S>5236</S> god<S>410</S>.

Jehovah<S>3068</S> will cut off<S>3772</S>, to the man<S>376</S> that doeth<S>6213</S> this<S>5782</S>, him that waketh and him that answereth<S>6030</S>, out of the tents<S>168</S> of Jacob<S>3290</S>, and him that offereth<S>5066</S> an offering<S>4503</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

And this again<S>8145</S> ye do<S>6213</S>: ye cover<S>3680</S> the altar<S>4196</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> with tears<S>1832</S>, with weeping<S>1065</S>, and with sighing<S>603</S>, insomuch that he regardeth<S>6437</S> not the offering<S>4503</S> any more<S>3947</S>, neither receiveth it with good will<S>7522</S> at your hand<S>3027</S>.

Yet ye say<S>559</S>, Wherefore<S>4100</S>? Because Jehovah<S>3068</S> hath been witness<S>5749</S> between thee and the wife<S>802</S> of thy youth<S>5271</S>, against whom thou hast dealt treacherously<S>898</S>, though she is thy companion<S>2278</S>, and the wife<S>802</S> of thy covenant<S>1285</S>.

And did he not make<S>6213</S> one<S>259</S>, although he had the residue<S>7605</S> of the Spirit<S>7307</S>? And wherefore one<S>259</S>? He sought<S>1245</S> a godly<S>430</S> seed<S>2233</S>. Therefore take heed<S>8104</S> to your spirit<S>7307</S>, and let none deal treacherously<S>898</S> against the wife<S>802</S> of his youth<S>5271</S>.

For I hate<S>8130</S> putting away<S>7971</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S>, the God<S>430</S> of Israel<S>3478</S>, and him that covereth<S>3680</S> his garment<S>3830</S> with violence<S>2555</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>: therefore take heed<S>8104</S> to your spirit<S>7307</S>, that ye deal not treacherously<S>898</S>.

Ye have wearied<S>3021</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> with your words<S>1697</S>. Yet ye say<S>559</S>, Wherein have we wearied<S>3021</S> him<S>559</S>? In that ye say, Every one that doeth<S>6213</S> evil<S>7451</S> is good<S>2896</S> in the sight<S>5869</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and he delighteth<S>2654</S> in them<S>430</S>; or where is the God of justice<S>4941</S>?

Behold<S>7971</S>, I send my messenger<S>4397</S>, and he shall prepare<S>6437</S> the way<S>1870</S> before<S>6440</S> me<S>113</S>: and the Lord, whom ye seek<S>1245</S>, will suddenly<S>6597</S> come<S>935</S> to his temple<S>1964</S>; and the messenger<S>4397</S> of the covenant<S>1285</S>, whom ye desire<S>2655</S>, behold<S>935</S>, he cometh, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

But who can abide<S>3557</S> the day<S>3117</S> of his coming<S>935</S>? and who shall stand<S>5975</S> when he appeareth<S>7200</S>? for he is like a refiner<S>6884</S>'s fire<S>784</S>, and like fuller<S>3526</S>'s soap<S>1287</S>:

and he will sit<S>3427</S> as a refiner<S>6884</S> and purifier<S>2891</S> of silver<S>3701</S>, and he will purify<S>2891</S> the sons<S>1121</S> of Levi<S>3878</S>, and refine<S>2212</S> them as gold<S>2091</S> and silver<S>3701</S>; and they shall offer<S>5066</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S> offerings<S>4503</S> in righteousness<S>6666</S>.

Then shall the offering<S>4503</S> of Judah<S>3063</S> and Jerusalem<S>3389</S> be pleasant<S>6149</S> unto Jehovah<S>3068</S>, as in the days<S>3117</S> of old<S>5769</S>, and as in ancient<S>6931</S> years<S>8141</S>.

And I will come near<S>7126</S> to you to judgment<S>4941</S>; and I will be a swift<S>4116</S> witness<S>5707</S> against the sorcerers<S>3784</S>, and against the adulterers<S>5003</S>, and against the false<S>8267</S> swearers<S>7650</S>, and against those that oppress<S>6231</S> the hireling<S>7916</S> in his wages<S>7939</S>, the widow<S>490</S>, and the fatherless<S>3490</S>, and that turn aside<S>5186</S> the sojourner<S>1616</S> from his right<S>3372</S>, and fear not me<S>559</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.
For I<S>3068</S>, Jehovah, change<S>8138</S> not<S>1121</S>; therefore ye, O sons of Jacob<S>3290</S>, are not consumed<S>3615</S>.

From the days<S>3117</S> of your fathers<S>1</S> ye have turned aside<S>5493</S> from mine ordinances<S>2706</S>, and have not kept<S>8104</S> them<S>7725</S>. Return unto me<S>7725</S>, and I will return unto you<S>559</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>. But ye say<S>559</S>, Wherein shall we return<S>7725</S>?
Will a man<S>120</S> rob<S>6906</S> God<S>430</S>? yet ye rob<S>6906</S> me<S>559</S>. But ye say, Wherein have we robbed<S>6906</S> thee<S>4643</S>? In tithes and offerings<S>8641</S>.
Ye are cursed<S>779</S> with the curse<S>3994</S>; for ye rob<S>6906</S> me<S>1471</S>, even this whole nation.

Bring<S>935</S> ye the whole tithe<S>4643</S> into the store-house<S>214</S>, that there may be food<S>2964</S> in my house<S>1004</S>, and prove<S>974</S> me now herewith<S>2063</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, if I will not open<S>6605</S> you the windows<S>699</S> of heaven<S>8064</S>, and pour you out<S>7324</S> a blessing<S>1293</S>, that there shall not be room enough to receive it<S>1767</S>.

And I will rebuke<S>1605</S> the devourer<S>398</S> for your sakes<S>7843</S>, and he shall not destroy the fruits<S>6529</S> of your ground<S>127</S>; neither shall your vine<S>1612</S> cast its fruit<S>7921</S> before the time in the field<S>7704</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.
And all nations<S>1471</S> shall call you happy<S>833</S>; for ye shall be a delightsome<S>2656</S> land<S>776</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.
Your words<S>1697</S> have been stout<S>2388</S> against me<S>559</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S>. Yet ye say<S>559</S>, What have we spoken against thee<S>1696</S>?

Ye have said<S>559</S>, It is vain<S>7723</S> to serve<S>5647</S> God<S>430</S>; and what profit<S>1215</S> is it that we have kept<S>8104</S> his charge<S>4931</S>, and that we have walked<S>1980</S> mournfully<S>6941</S> before<S>6440</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>?

And now we call<S>833</S> the proud<S>2086</S> happy<S>833</S>; yea<S>6213</S>, they that work wickedness<S>7564</S> are built up<S>1129</S>; yea<S>974</S>, they tempt God<S>430</S>, and escape<S>4422</S>.

Then they that feared<S>3373</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> spake<S>1696</S> one<S>376</S> with another<S>7453</S>; and Jehovah<S>3068</S> hearkened<S>7181</S>, and heard<S>8085</S>, and a book<S>5612</S> of remembrance<S>2146</S> was written<S>3789</S> before<S>6440</S> him<S>3373</S>, for them that feared Jehovah<S>3068</S>, and that thought<S>2803</S> upon his name<S>8034</S>.

And they shall be mine<S>559</S>, saith Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, even mine own possession<S>5459</S>, in the day<S>3117</S> that I make<S>6213</S>; and I will spare<S>2550</S> them<S>376</S>, as a man spareth<S>2550</S> his own son<S>1121</S> that serveth him<S>5647</S>.

Then shall ye return<S>7725</S> and discern<S>7200</S> between the righteous<S>6662</S> and the wicked<S>7563</S>, between him that serveth<S>5647</S> God<S>430</S> and him that serveth him not<S>5647</S>.

For<S>3117</S>, behold, the day cometh<S>935</S>, it burneth<S>1197</S> as a furnace<S>8574</S>; and all the proud<S>2086</S>, and all that work<S>6213</S> wickedness<S>7564</S>, shall be stubble<S>7179</S>; and the day<S>3117</S> that cometh<S>935</S> shall burn them up<S>3857</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>, that it shall leave<S>5800</S> them neither root<S>8328</S> nor branch<S>6057</S>.

But unto you that fear<S>3373</S> my name<S>8034</S> shall the sun<S>8121</S> of righteousness<S>6666</S> arise<S>2224</S> with healing<S>4832</S> in its wings<S>3671</S>; and ye shall go forth<S>3318</S>, and gambol<S>6335</S> as calves<S>5695</S> of the stall<S>4770</S>.

And ye shall tread down<S>6072</S> the wicked<S>7563</S>; for they shall be ashes<S>665</S> under the soles<S>3709</S> of your feet<S>7272</S> in the day<S>3117</S> that I make<S>6213</S>, saith<S>559</S> Jehovah<S>3068</S> of hosts<S>6635</S>.

Remember<S>2142</S> ye the law<S>8451</S> of Moses<S>4872</S> my servant<S>5650</S>, which I commanded<S>6680</S> unto him in Horeb<S>2722</S> for all Israel<S>3478</S>, even statutes<S>2706</S> and ordinances<S>4941</S>.
Behold<S>7971</S>, I will send you Elijah<S>452</S> the prophet<S>5030</S> before<S>6440</S> the great<S>1419</S> and terrible<S>3372</S> day<S>3117</S> of Jehovah<S>3068</S> come<S>935</S>.

And he shall turn<S>7725</S> the heart<S>3820</S> of the fathers<S>1</S> to the children<S>1121</S>, and the heart<S>3820</S> of the children<S>1121</S> to their fathers<S>1</S>; lest I come<S>935</S> and smite<S>5221</S> the earth<S>776</S> with a curse<S>2764</S>.
